mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.username, b.book_name FROM dbo.t_borrow_record r LEFT JOIN dbo.t_user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN dbo.t_book b ON r.book_id = b.id ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.*, u.username, b.book_name FROM dbo.t_borrow_record r LEFT JOIN dbo.t_user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN dbo.t_book b ON r.book_id = b.id
(u.username LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR b.book_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
AND r.status = #{status}
ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.*, u.username, b.book_name FROM dbo.t_borrow_record r LEFT JOIN dbo.t_user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN dbo.t_book b ON r.book_id = b.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.t_borrow_record (user_id, book_id, borrow_time, due_time, status, renew_count, remark, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{borrowTime}, #{dueTime}, #{status}, 0, #{remark}, GETDATE())
